description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical lighthouse set atop a sandy, irregularly shaped island base scattered with large, dark rocks. The lighthouse features a prominent lantern room at the top, encased in glass and capped with a pointed roof, suggesting it houses a powerful beacon. A narrow gallery balcony encircles the lantern room, providing a walkway with a railing. The tower itself is constructed from dark stone or brick, with a slightly tapered profile that narrows as it rises. The base of the lighthouse is broad and solid, anchoring the structure firmly to the rocky terrain. The surrounding rocks vary in size and shape, adding a rugged, naturalistic context to the scene.
description: A tall, dark stone lighthouse with a glass lantern room and gallery balcony, standing on a sandy, rock-strewn island base.
description_view_0: The lighthouse is centered with a clear view of the lantern room and balcony, surrounded by several large rocks on the sandy base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a prominent rock on the left and a more scattered arrangement of rocks on the right, with the lighthouse tower rising centrally.
description_view_2: The lighthouse is seen with the largest rocks flanking both sides, and the sandy base appears more open in the foreground.
description_view_3: A massive rock dominates the right side of the base, with the lighthouse tower and lantern room clearly visible above.
